name: Beauty Fashion Portrait
commercial_use: Beauty-fashion campaign, brand editorial, social hero image
visual_goal: Balance face, makeup, hair, and upper-body styling in a polished fashion portrait.
composition: Chest-up or shoulder-up portrait with clean framing and visible styling details.
model_direction: Hold a calm expression, elongated neck, soft jawline, eyes connected to camera or slightly off-camera.
styling_notes: Makeup, hair, jewelry, neckline, and fabric should work as one clear visual system.
lighting: Large soft beauty light with gentle catchlights and smooth skin texture.
camera_language: 85mm to 105mm portrait lens look, shallow but controlled depth of field.
prompt: Professional beauty fashion portrait of a model with refined hair, makeup, and upper-body styling, soft beauty lighting, clean composition, premium skin texture, elegant expression, commercial editorial mood.
negative_prompt: plastic skin, heavy retouching, crossed eyes, messy hair, distorted jewelry, unbalanced makeup, low-detail face
